title: Cissus hochstetteri
intro: Cissus hochstetteri, also known as the African grape ivy, is a perennial climbing plant native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote bone health and reduce inflammation, making it beneficial for the treatment of osteoporosis and arthritis. The bioactive constituents of Cissus hochstetteri include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional African medicine, Cissus hochstetteri is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it is also used in the production of herbal supplements and capsules for the support of bone health and joint mobility.
